name: HRA_SECTION_DEFNS_VL
query: SELECT SD.SECTION_DEF_ID, SD.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, SDTL.NAME, SDTL.DESCRIPTION, SDTL.COMMENTS, SD.DATE_FROM, SD.DATE_TO, SD.STATUS_CODE, SD.SECTION_TYPE_CODE, SD.RATE_SECTION_FLAG, SD.CONTENT_TYPE_ID, SD.FREE_FORM_ALLOWED_FLAG, SD.ADD_ITEMS_CONFIRM_CRIT_FLAG, SD.RATE_ITEM_FLAG, SD.RATING_TYPE_CODE, SD.USE_SECRTG_FOR_PERFRTG_FLAG, SD.PERF_RATING_MODEL_ID, SD.ITEM_CALCULATION_CODE, SD.SHOW_TARGET_PERF_RTG, SD.SHOW_TARGET_PROF_LEVEL, SD.SHOW_SECTION_WEIGHT, SD.SHOW_SECTION_MIN_WEIGHT, SD.SHOW_MANDATORY, SD.SHOW_CRITICAL, SD.SHOW_DESCRIPTION, SD.SHOW_MEASUREMENT, SD.SHOW_DUE_DATE, SD.SHOW_REMINDER_DATE, SD.SHOW_OWNED_BY, SD.SHOW_STATUS, SD.SHOW_PERCENT_COMPLETE, SD.USE_PROFILE_FLAG, SD.PROFILE_TYPE_ID, SD.USE_SPEC_PROFILE_FLAG, SD.PROFILE_ID, SD.USE_WORKER_GOALS_FLAG, SD.USE_SPEC_CONTENT_ITEM_FLAG, SD.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, SD.ATTRIBUTE1, SD.ATTRIBUTE2, SD.ATTRIBUTE3, SD.ATTRIBUTE4, SD.ATTRIBUTE5, SD.ATTRIBUTE6, SD.ATTRIBUTE7, SD.ATTRIBUTE8, SD.ATTRIBUTE9, SD.ATTRIBUTE10, SD.ATTRIBUTE11, SD.ATTRIBUTE12, SD.ATTRIBUTE13, SD.ATTRIBUTE14, SD.ATTRIBUTE15, SD.ATTRIBUTE16, SD.ATTRIBUTE17, SD.ATTRIBUTE18, SD.ATTRIBUTE19, SD.ATTRIBUTE20, SD.ATTRIBUTE21, SD.ATTRIBUTE22, SD.ATTRIBUTE23, SD.ATTRIBUTE24, SD.ATTRIBUTE25, SD.ATTRIBUTE26, SD.ATTRIBUTE27, SD.ATTRIBUTE28, SD.ATTRIBUTE29, SD.ATTRIBUTE30, SD.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, SD.CREATED_BY, SD.CREATION_DATE, SD.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, SD.LAST_UPDATED_BY, SD.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, SD.MODULE_ID, SD.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER1, SD.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER2, SD.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER3, SD.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER4, SD.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER5, SD.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER6, SD.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER7, SD.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER8, SD.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER9, SD.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER10, SD.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER11, SD.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER12, SD.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER13, SD.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER14, SD.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER15, SD.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER16, SD.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER17, SD.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER18, SD.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER19, SD.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER20, SD.ATTRIBUTE_DATE1, SD.ATTRIBUTE_DATE2, SD.ATTRIBUTE_DATE3, SD.ATTRIBUTE_DATE4, SD.ATTRIBUTE_DATE5, SD.ATTRIBUTE_DATE6, SD.ATTRIBUTE_DATE7, SD.ATTRIBUTE_DATE8, SD.ATTRIBUTE_DATE9, SD.ATTRIBUTE_DATE10, SD.ATTRIBUTE_DATE11, SD.ATTRIBUTE_DATE12, SD.ATTRIBUTE_DATE13, SD.ATTRIBUTE_DATE14, SD.ATTRIBUTE_DATE15, SD.USE_WRITING_ASSISTANT_FLAG, SD.ROUNDING_RULE_CODE, SD.DECIMAL_PLACES, SD.MAPPING_METHOD_CODE, SD.CALC_MAPPING_CODE, SD.USE_SEC_WEIGHTS_FOR_CALC, SD.ENABLE_CHILD_ITEMS_FLAG, SD.INCLUDE_FUTURE_ITEMS_FLAG, SD.EXCLUDE_INACTIVE_ITEMS_FLAG, SD.UPDATE_GOAL_WEIGHTS_FLAG, SD.REFERENCE_SECTION_ID, SD.ENABLE_SECTION_COMMENTS_FLAG, SD.ENABLE_ITEM_COMMENTS_FLAG, SD.EVALUATION_TYPE_CODE, SD.ENABLE_SYNC_FLAG, SD.INCLUDE_QSTNR_SCORING_FLAG, SD.INCLUDE_QSTNR_SCORE_OS_FLAG, SD.ENABLE_MGR_REASON_FLAG, SD.SKILL_TYPE_CODE, SD.SKILL_PROGRESS_CODE, SD.LOCK_EVAL_WHEN_GOAL_SET_FLAG FROM HRA_SECTION_DEFNS_B SD, HRA_SECTION_DEFNS_TL SDTL WHERE SD.SECTION_DEF_ID = SDTL.SECTION_DEF_ID AND SD.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = SDTL.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID AND SDTL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
